title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.579 - Rules authorized
text:
447.579.  Rules authorized. — The treasurer is hereby authorized to make necessary rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of sections 447.500 to 447.595.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1088 § 25, A.L. 1993 H.B. 566, A.L. 1994 S.B. 757) 
Effective 7-01-94
